jd_text: Forgeline is looking for a VP of GTM Operations to build and scale our revenue operations function. You will report to the CRO and lead a team of 8-12 people across RevOps, CS Ops, and Deal Desk. This is a greenfield opportunity — we're building the GTM operating system from scratch as we transition from PLG to enterprise sales. We use Salesforce, Gainsight, Slack, and Google Workspace. Our team is remote-first with quarterly in-person offsites. The ideal candidate has scaled GTM operations at a $100M+ ARR SaaS company and has experience with consumption-based pricing models. Compensation: $250,000-$320,000 OTE + equity. MacBook Pro provided. Series D, $425M raised.
notes: Dream job scenario. Hits almost every preference.

jd_text: Acme Corp is hiring a Director of Revenue Operations to optimize our existing sales and CS processes. You'll report to the CFO and manage a team of 3. Our primary focus is cleaning up Salesforce data hygiene, standardizing our reporting, and reducing manual work in our renewal process. We are a Series C healthcare technology company based in Boston with a hybrid work model (3 days in office required). We use Microsoft Teams, Windows, and HubSpot CRM. Compensation: $185,000-$215,000 base + 15% bonus. No equity at this time.
notes: Should score very low. Healthcare sector (hard no), Windows/Teams, reports to CFO, process cleanup only, no equity, in-office required. Tests multiple penalty stacking.

job_title: Head of GTM Strategy and Operations
jd_text: Sentora is looking for a Head of GTM Strategy and Operations to define and execute our go-to-market operating model. This is a newly created role — we are building this function from scratch — a true build from scratch greenfield mandate — reporting to the COO. You'll work cross-functionally with Sales, CS, and Product to build the systems and processes that scale our developer-focused security platform. We're a Series C company with $100M+ raised, 200 employees, and growing 80% YoY. Our pricing is transitioning from seat-based to consumption-based as we expand our platform capabilities. We offer fully remote work, competitive salary ($200k-$280k base), meaningful equity, and use Slack, Salesforce, and Mac across the company. The ideal candidate brings financial rigor to GTM operations — someone who can build board-ready reporting while also rolling up their sleeves on process design.
notes: Near-perfect fit. DevTools, greenfield, COO reporting line, pricing transition, remote, financial rigor emphasis. Note: founder_type requires research data, not detectable from JD text alone.

jd_text: MidCo Analytics is hiring a Director of Business Operations. You'll report to the VP of Sales and manage operational support for the sales team. Key responsibilities include pipeline reporting, territory management, and quota setting. We're a Series B analytics company with 150 employees. Hybrid role based in Sacramento, CA (2 days per week in office). Compensation: $185,000-$210,000 base. Standard benefits package. We use Salesforce, Slack, and Google Workspace on Macs.
notes: Mixed bag. Good tech stack, good location, but reports to VP Sales (not C-level), salary range is mid, no equity mentioned, scope is narrow (sales support only). Tests the 'Worth a Look' tier.

jd_text: PokerStars Tech is seeking a VP of Operations to lead our global operations team. Fully remote, $350,000 OTE, significant equity. We are revolutionizing online gaming with AI-powered experiences.
notes: Auto-reject test. Gambling sector. Should score 0 regardless of attractive compensation and remote work.
